data.biography:
Austin Rhodes Is an American actor and Model. Austin honed his skills in Atlanta Georgia, Orlando, and Tampa Florida. While living in Florida Austin studied Multiple types of acting classes and stunt training to develop different techniques to help build his craft. He worked not only in front but also behind the camera on Indie films, features, and TV shows.

Prior to working professionally as an actor, Austin trained over a decade as a Martial-Art instructor of Capoeira and BJJ. Austin enlisted in the Marines as an Infantry Rifleman. He would later move to Maryland and continue to serve as an Executive Protection Officer carrying out his duties while maintaining a safe environment during higher echelon town hall meetings, and maintaining protection for undisputed lightweight boxing champion Gervonte Davis and others. Austin then moved to Florida to compete as a Classic Physique Competitor where he would win his second show giving him the opportunity to compete as a national competitor.

When not acting, Austin continues to lift weights and train Martial-Arts. He helps others reach their goals with diet, and workout plans.
data.name: Austin J. Rhodes

data.biography:
Film Rachanun Mahawan is a Thai actress under GMMTV. In 2022, she graduated with a bachelor's degree from the School of Architecture and Design at the King Mongkut's University of Technology Thonburi.

Film started in the entertainment industry in 2019 when she became one of the two winners of the Clean & Clear's and GMMTV's star search competition "Go On Girl & Guy Star Search 2019". She made her acting debut in 2019 with a guest role in the series "Dark Blue Kiss".
data.name: Rachanun Mahawan
รชานันท์ มหาวรรณ์

data.biography: Yerra Raghu, known professionally as Raghu Babu, is a Telugu comedian well known for his comic expressions and timing. He has worked in many successful films in Telugu industry. He is the eldest son of famous comedian and character actor Giri Babu.
data.name: Raghu Babu

data.biography: Kenji Takahashi, known professionally as Kenji Ohba is a prolific Japanese actor and former stuntman best known for his roles in the Super Sentai and Metal Heroes series, especially as Retsu Ichijouji / Gavan in the 1982 TV series Space Sheriff Gavan. He is the president of his own action/stunt troupe called "Luck JET" ("JET" being an acronym for "Jaunty Eventful Troupe"). [Wikipedia]
data.name: Kenji Ohba

data.biography: 白雪岑，又名白杺瓒，原名白雪，演员、配音演员。毕业于北京电影学院高职配音班，师从资深配音演员徐燕。现居北京。嗓音轻柔纯净，擅长演绎温柔可人的女性角色。代表作电视剧《雪山飞狐》程灵素、《鹿鼎记》阿珂，游戏《仙剑奇侠传》系列柳梦璃、凌波等。
data.name: 白雪岑

data.biography: 白雪岑，又名白杺瓚，原名白雪，演員、配音演員。畢業於北京電影學院高職配音班，師從資深配音演員徐燕。現居北京。嗓音輕柔純淨，擅長演繹温柔可人的女性角色。代表作電視劇《雪山飛狐》程靈素、《鹿鼎記》阿珂，遊戲《仙劍奇俠傳》系列柳夢璃、淩波等。
data.name: 白雪岑

data.biography: Marie Miyake (三宅 麻理恵, Miyake Marie, June 7, 1985) is a Japanese voice actress (seiyū) from Osaka Prefecture. She is affiliated with Raccoon Dog. She was previously affiliated with Pro Fit. She has blood type O and is 162 cm tall.
data.name: Marie Miyake

data.biography: Marie Miyake (三宅 麻理恵, Miyake Marie, 7 de junio de 1985) es una actriz de voz (seiyū) japonesa de la prefectura de Osaka. Está afiliada a Raccoon Dog. Anteriormente estuvo afiliada a Pro Fit. Tiene grupo sanguíneo O y mide 162 cm.
data.name: Marie Miyake

data.biography:
Byungchan (병찬), also referred to by his full name Choi Byungchan, is a South Korean singer under Play M Entertainment. He is a member of the boy group VICTON.

In May 2019, he, alongside Seungwoo, became a contestant on the competition show Produce X 101. However, on July 11, it was announced he would be leaving the show due to health issues.
data.name: Choi Byung-chan

data.biography: 韩国男歌手、舞者和演员，在韩国男子团体VICTON内担任副唱。2016年11月9日，透过首张迷你专辑《Voice To New World》，以主打歌《I'm fine》出道，曾参加大热选秀《Produce X 101》，因腿伤中途退赛。2020年，通过JTBC迷你剧《Live》作为演员出道。
data.name: 崔秉灿

data.biography: 韓國男歌手、舞者和演員，在韓國男子團體 VICTON 內擔任副唱。2016 年 11 月 9 日，透過首張迷你專輯《Voice To New World》，以主打歌《I'm fine》出道，曾參加大熱選秀《Produce X 101》，因腿傷中途退賽。2020 年，通過 JTBC 迷你劇《Live》作為演員出道。
data.name: 崔秉燦
Đấu Phá Thương Khung
data.overview: Phim Đấu Phá Thương Khung: Chuyển thể từ tiểu thuyết cùng tên của tác giả Thiên Tàm Thổ Đậu.  Tiêu Viêm là thiên tài tu luyện đấu khí của nhà họ Tiêu, 11 tuổi đã đột phá Thập Đoạn Đấu Chi Khí, trở thành đấu thủ trẻ tuổi nhất của gia tộc suốt trăm năm qua. Nhưng đến năm 12 tuổi, Tiêu Viêm bất ngờ mất đi khả năng tu luyện, chỉ còn lại Tam Đoạn Đấu Chi Khí. Trong 3 năm sau đó, nhà họ Tiêu cũng liên tiếp gặp nhiều bất trắc.  Đúng vào lúc Tiêu Viêm tuyệt vọng nhất, một linh hồn xuất hiện từ trong chiếc nhẫn trên tay Tiêu Viêm, mở ra trước mắt Tiêu Viêm một cánh cửa hoàn toàn mới. Dưới sự giúp đỡ của Dược lão, Tiêu Viêm đã hồi phục và nâng cao được công lực của mình, đánh bại Nạp Lan Yên Nhiên khi giao hẹn ba năm đến.  Nhưng không may là cha Tiêu Viêm lại bị Vân Lam tông bắt đi, Tiêu Viêm lại bắt đầu cuộc hành trình nhiều thử thách nhằm cứu thoát cha mình…

data.biography: Lynn は、日本の女性声優。
data.name: Lynn

data.biography: Lynn is a Japanese voice actress from Niigata Prefecture affiliated with the agency Arts Vision. She was born to a Japanese–American father and a Japanese–Brazilian mother in Yokosuka, Kanagawa. After becoming interested in entering the entertainment industry early in life, she made her debut as a voice actress in 2011. Originally playing supporting characters, she played her first main roles in 2014. She is known for her roles as Nozomi Kaminashi in Keijo! and Fuuka Akitsuki in Fuuka.

Lynn是日本的女性声优。

美日混血儿，Lynn是她的本名。

非常喜欢猫。怕蛇。

喜欢的歌手是绚香。

喜欢的食物是拉面，讨厌的食物是韭菜。

日本播音演技研究所出身，养成所时期在日播研的第一天便迷路找不到教室了，被路过的饭田友子搭救带到了教室

开心的时候会哼歌，被夸赞的时候会害羞
data.name: 琳恩

data.biography: Lynn 是日本的女性聲優，為美日混血兒，父親為美國人，父姓為 Starr。出生於神奈川縣橫須賀市，成長於新潟縣，所屬公司為 ARTSVISION。
data.name: Lynn

data.biography: Lynn ist eine japanische Synchronsprecherin aus der Präfektur Niigata, die der Agentur Arts Vision angehört. Sie wurde als Tochter eines japanisch-amerikanischen Vaters und einer japanisch-brasilianischen Mutter in Yokosuka, Kanagawa, geboren. Nachdem sie früh das Interesse daran entwickelte, in die Unterhaltungsbranche einzusteigen, gab sie 2011 ihr Debüt als Synchronsprecherin. Ursprünglich sprach sie Nebenrollen, bevor sie 2014 erstmals Hauptrollen übernahm. Bekannt ist sie für Rollen wie Nozomi Kaminashi in Keijo! und Fuuka Akitsuki in Fuuka.
data.name: Lynn

data.biography:
Лінн - японська сейю з префектури Niigata. Дебютувала в 2011 році.

Вона відома своїми ролями як Нозомі Камінаші в Кейджо! і Фуука Акіцукі у Фууці.
data.name: Лінн

data.biography:
Morris Lamont Chestnut is an American film and television actor. He is known for his roles as teenage father Ricky Baker in the 1991 film Boyz n the Hood, groom-to-be Lance Sullivan in the 1999 film The Best Man, as NBA star Tracy Reynolds in the 2002 film Like Mike, and as the Visitor Ryan Nichols in the TV series V (2009).

His first professional acting role was as Jadon in Freddy's Nightmares: A Nightmare on Elm Street: The Series in the episode "A Family Affair" (season 2, episode 19) which aired on February 18, 1990.

His first feature film role was as Ricky Baker in Boyz n the Hood (1991). He followed with roles in various TV movies. Chestnut also played a role on Patti LaBelle's short-lived sitcom Out All Night. His career continued to rise steadily with co-starring roles in standard big-budget studio films like Under Siege 2 (1995) and G.I. Jane (1997). In 1998, he won the annual Madden Bowl video game competition.

In 1999, he starred in The Best Man with Taye Diggs and Nia Long in which he played a professional football player on the eve of his wedding. He reprised his role in Best Man Holiday. For both of his performances, he earned NAACP Image Award nominations. He then starred in The Brothers (2001), another film centering on the themes of fidelity and success among urban professionals.  He has worked with Steven Seagal three times in Under Siege 2: Dark Territory, Half Past Dead and Prince of Pistols.

He starred In Two Can Play That Game (2001), Breakin' All the Rules (2004), and Ladder 49 (2004). He again played a football player in The Game Plan (2007). He produced and starred in the film Not Easily Broken (2009). He starred as Ryan Nichols in the TV series reboot of V (2009). He then appeared in the films Think Like a Man (2012), and, in 2013, the films Identity Thief, Kick-Ass 2, and The Call.

In 2013, he joined the cast of HBO's Nurse Jackie, playing war veteran Dr. Ike Prentiss. The following year, he won the NAACP Image Award for Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Comedy Series. In 2015, Morris Chestnut played Derrick Dog Prince in the movie Heist; and People magazine named him as one of the "Sexiest Men Alive" in 2015. He then starred in the films The Perfect Guy (2016) and When the Bough Breaks (2017).

He played the lead role of pathologist Dr. Beaumont Rosewood Jr. in the series Rosewood, receiving another NAACP image Award nomination. He had recurring roles in the TV series Legends, The Enemy Within, and Our Kind of People. He had a starring guest role on the medical drama The Resident.
data.name: Morris Chestnut

data.biography:
Morris L. Chestnut (geboren op 1 januari 1969) is een Amerikaanse film- en televisieacteur. Hij staat bekend om zijn rollen als tienervader Ricky Baker in de film Boyz n the Hood uit 1991, aanstaande bruidegom Lance Sullivan in de film The Best Man uit 1999, als Tracy Reynolds, NBA-ster in de film Like Mike uit 2002 en als de bezoeker Ryan in de tv-serie van 2009-11 V. Chestnut werd geboren in Cerritos, Californië, waar hij in 1986 afstudeerde aan de RichardGahr High School.

Vervolgens studeerde hij financiën en drama aan de CaliforniaStateUniversity, Northridge. Chestnut's eerste professionele acteerrol was als "Jadon" in Freddy's Nightmares: A Nightmare on Elm Street: The Series in de aflevering "A Family Affair" (seizoen 2, aflevering 19), die werd uitgezonden op 18 februari 1990. Zijn eerste speelfilmrol was als "Ricky Baker" in Boyz n the Hood (1991). Hij volgde met rollen in verschillende tv-films. Chestnut speelde ook een rol in Patti LaBelle's kortstondige sitcom Out All Night. Zijn carrière bleef gestaag stijgen met co-starring rollen in standaard big-budget studiofilms zoals Under Siege 2 (1995) en G.I. Jan (1997). In 1998 won hij de jaarlijkse Madden Bowl. In 1999 speelde Chestnut in The Best Man met Taye Diggs en Nia Long, waarin hij aan de vooravond van zijn huwelijk een profvoetballer speelde. The Best Man kreeg positieve recensies van de pers en deed het goed aan de kassa. Voor zijn optreden kreeg Chestnut een NAACP Image Award-nominatie. Vervolgens speelde hij in The Brothers, een andere film waarin de thema's trouw en succes onder stedelijke professionals centraal staan. Hij heeft drie keer met Steven Seagal gewerkt. In Under Siege 2: Dark Territory is Chestnut de onwillige partner van Seagal. In zowel Half Past Dead als Prince of Pistols speelt hij mee als de belangrijkste schurk. Hij was ook een voetballer in "The Game Plan" Chestnut is getrouwd met Pam Byse met wie hij een zoon en een dochter heeft. In een interview voor essence.com zei hij dat hij zijn privéleven liever privé houdt. Chestnut is fan van de Philadelphia Eagles en de USC Trojans. Morris Chestnut is ook een fervent pokerspeler en heeft een sponsorovereenkomst met online pokerroom Full Tilt Poker. Hij is ook een trots lid van Phi Beta Sigma

Morris Lamont Chestnut, né le 1er janvier 1969 à Cerritos (Californie), est un acteur américain qui s’est fait remarquer au début des années 1990. Il se révèle dans *Boyz n the Hood* (1991) en incarnant Ricky Baker, un rôle qui lance sa carrière.  Par la suite, il alterne entre films d’action, comédies romantiques et dramatiques : on le voit dans *G.I. Jane* (1997), *The Brothers* (2001), *Like Mike* (2002), *Ladder 49*, *The Game Plan* et *The Call*. Il reprend aussi des rôles déjà établis, comme Lance Sullivan dans *The Best Man*, qu’il retrouve pour la suite *The Best Man Holiday* et dans la mini-série *The Best Man: The Final Chapters*.  À la télévision, Chestnut a tenu des rôles principaux dans des séries telles que *Rosewood*, *Nurse Jackie*, *V*, *Goliath* et *The Resident*.  En 2024, il incarne le personnage principal dans la série *Watson*. Sa longévité et sa capacité à jouer dans des genres variés ( action, drame, romance ) font de lui une figure respectée à la fois au cinéma et à la télévision.
data.name: Morris Chestnut
